shell.sidebarFootnote: Standalone UI module over rpc-admin without Spring and without a dedicated REST API.
login.caption: Protected operator console for rpc-admin modules without Spring and without a separate REST layer.
login.invalidToken: Access token rejected. Verify the token and try again.
overview.pageDescription: Main screen for the current environment state, process resource usage, overload indicators and channel connectivity in a single observation surface.
overview.summary.title: State Summary
overview.metrics.runtimes.title: Execution Contours
overview.metrics.channels.title: Channels
overview.metrics.activeChannels.title: Live Channels
overview.metrics.activeChannels.hint: Ready to receive and send traffic
overview.metrics.pausedChannels.title: Paused Channels
overview.metrics.clients.title: Clients
overview.metrics.servers.title: Servers
overview.metrics.services.title: Services
overview.telemetry.title: Process and Memory
overview.telemetry.description: Metrics are collected locally from the JVM and the host operating system where the console is running.
overview.telemetry.processCpu.title: Process CPU
overview.telemetry.systemCpu.title: Host CPU
overview.telemetry.heapUsed.title: Heap Used
overview.telemetry.threads.title: JVM Threads
overview.telemetry.uptime.title: Uptime
overview.runtime.title: Execution Contours
overview.runtime.description: Base binding to runtimes and transport-level working directories.
overview.runtime.header.name: Name
overview.channels.title: Observed Channels
overview.channels.description: Short operational slice before switching to the detailed channel screen.
overview.channels.header.name: Channel
channels.pageDescription: Screen for transport settings, channel pressure indicators, timeout tracking, waiters queue saturation and links to services, servers and clients.
channels.section.title: Channels and Connectivity
channels.section.description: Each card shows topology, transport settings, pressure indicators and the operator state of a channel.
channels.closedHint: Closed channels are available in read-only mode.
methods.pageDescription: Manage registries of clients, servers and services, and audit method calls. Client latency shows the full round-trip, server latency shows only server-side execution time.
methods.services.title: Services Registry
methods.services.description: The service layer is the only place where individual methods can be enabled or disabled.
methods.services.header.name: Service
methods.servers.title: Server Contours
methods.servers.description: Server latency shows only execution time on the provider side, without client round-trip.
methods.servers.header.name: Server
methods.clients.title: Client Contours
methods.clients.description: Client latency includes request publication, response waiting and the complete round-trip time.
methods.clients.header.name: Client
methods.catalog.title: Methods Catalog
methods.catalog.description: Service methods are manageable below, while client and server rows remain available for diagnostics and auditing without state changes.
